name: BrepTrimList
summary: Provides access to all the Trims in a Brep object

methods.name: Add(Int32)
methods.summary: Add a new trim that will be part of an inner, outer, or slit loop to the brep.
methods.remarks: You should set the trim's Tolerance, TrimType, and IsoStatus values. In general, you should try to use the Add( edge, bRev3d, loop, c2i ) version of NewTrim. If you want to add a singular trim, use AddSingularTrim. If you want to add a curve-on-surface trim, use AddCurveOnFace. If you want to add a point-on-surface trim, use AddPointOnFace.

methods.name: Add(Boolean, BrepEdge, Int32)
methods.signature: public BrepTrim Add(bool rev3d, BrepEdge edge, int curve2dIndex)
methods.summary: Add a new trim that will be part of an inner, outer, or slit loop to the brep

params.name: rev3d
params.doc: true if the edge and trim have opposite directions

methods.name: Add(Boolean, BrepLoop, Int32)
methods.signature: public BrepTrim Add(bool rev3d, BrepLoop loop, int curve2dIndex)
methods.summary: Add a new trim that will be part of an inner, outer, or slit loop to the brep

params.name: rev3d
params.doc: true if the edge and trim have opposite directions

params.name: loop
params.doc: trim is appended to this loop

methods.name: Add(BrepEdge, Boolean, BrepLoop, Int32)
methods.signature: public BrepTrim Add(BrepEdge edge, bool rev3d, BrepLoop loop, int curve2dIndex)
methods.summary: Add a new trim that will be part of an inner, outer, or slit loop to the brep.

params.name: rev3d
params.doc: true if the edge and trim have opposite directions

params.name: loop
params.doc: trim is appended to this loop

methods.name: AddCurveOnFace
methods.signature: public BrepTrim AddCurveOnFace(BrepFace face, BrepEdge edge, bool rev3d, int curve2dIndex)
methods.summary: Add a new curve on face to the brep
methods.remarks: You should set the trim's tolerance and iso values.

params.name: edge
params.doc: 3d edge associated with this curve on surface

params.name: rev3d
params.doc: true if the 3d edge and the 2d parameter space curve have opposite directions.

params.name: curve2dIndex
params.doc: index of 2d curve in face's parameter space

returns.doc: new trim that represents the curve on surface

methods.name: AddSingularTrim
methods.signature: public BrepTrim AddSingularTrim(BrepVertex vertex, BrepLoop loop, IsoStatus iso, int curve2dIndex)
methods.summary: Add a new singular trim to the brep.

params.name: loop
params.doc: trim is appended to this loop

methods.name: GetEnumerator
methods.summary: Gets an enumerator that visits all edges.

methods.name: MatchEnds()
methods.summary: Matches the endpoints of all trims in the Brep.

returns.doc: true if any trim's 2d curve is changed, false otherwise.

methods.name: MatchEnds(Int32)
methods.summary: Match the endpoints of a trim to the next and previous trim.

returns.doc: true if any trim's 2d curve is changed, false otherwise.

methods.name: MatchEnds(BrepLoop)
methods.summary: Match the endpoints of all trims in a loop.

returns.doc: true if any trim's 2d curve is changed, false otherwise.

methods.name: MatchEnds(BrepTrim, BrepTrim)
methods.signature: public bool MatchEnds(BrepTrim trim0, BrepTrim trim1)
methods.summary: Match the end of a trim to the start of the next trim.

params.name: trim1
params.doc: Brep trim that comes immediately after trim0 in the same loop.

returns.doc: true if either trim's 2d curve is changed, false otherwise.

properties.name: Count
properties.summary: Gets the number of brep trims.

properties.name: Item
properties.summary: Gets the BrepTrim at the given index. The index must be valid or an IndexOutOfRangeException will be thrown.
